title: Walid's wedding
description: A cinematic love story where fate, chaos, and bold decisions collide. Set between the astonishing view of lezzeno and the magical streets of Oran, Walid’s Wedding captures a journey of passion, unexpected twists, and unforgettable moments—where one reckless act, one fearless confession, and one unforgettable girl change everything forever. ✨

parts.title: Walid's Wedding ¹
parts.content:
Year 2035 - Lezzeno
A corner restaurant facing Lake Como's mind stealing sunset..the smell of a fine Italian pasta violin sound merged with the soft sound of waves reaching the shore..
"Mi scusi, potrebbe annullare il dessert, per favore? Grazie mille!!"..said my wife to the waitress..
"Your Italian is getting good...what did you tell her?"..I asked wiping sauce off her side lips...she answered..."I told her to cancel the dessert because you had too much sugar today darling"..I replied sarcastically holding my phone "you should've been a doctor babe uh wait walid just sent me a message"
"no way!!!" I said in shock as she flips in curiosity..
"what happened??"..I replied "he's getting married this week".. looking through her eyes I knew her second question "with whom??? Didn't he break up with Ruksi last year??"...and then I remembered I haven't told her about walid's new Lover..which takes us back to last year's event.
Year 2034 - Oran
Right after Adem's wedding...walid got into a deep fight with Ruksi..in short Ruksi wanted to live in her birth country Kurdistan and walid disagreed...the second worst place to live besides Es Senia...after waves of conflict they decided to end their engagement journey and walid decided to "start new".
Something you probably said at least three times in your life.. meanwhile I was establishing my company in Italy and guess who found this business trip so amusing...while I was busy with work my beloved wife was visiting every art museum there is in lezzeno learning the recipes and the language all together..
Weeks later Walid called me to meet up again at the same cafeteria that faces Lake Como...the one from the twisted romance journey he got me into... getting him back with Ruksi was a mistake but this time he will tell me about his new love... Amina.
It was The Champions League and Barcelona was playing when Walid was watching on his phone in the Canadian airport waiting for his flight to Oran.. not a very short red-haired girl with a pink dress came closer to him as she speaks in a feminine way with her east Algerian accent "are you watching Barça?"..her brown eyes that glisten with joy and excitement made him pause for a moment before he nods yes...she asked gently if she can watch with him...
Her and his flight were set to be after 2 hours which made them discuss every detail regarding players and prediction for the future scores... laughs and information flexing made them click so fast yet walid was still not believing that she was real.
A girl with an outstanding beauty who knows about football just like him.."I'm going to stay for a week in Oran I would love to take you on a date" said walid with a boldness neither him nor me are used to...
Amina blushed while pulling her hair behind her ears as she spoke "I would love to" still maintaining eye contact with him she continued in a sarcastic tone "...and we need to really talk more about Robert Lewandowski's performance.. because he's really getting slow the guy is so old and you still do not agree"
Fast forward.. Walid and Amina met on a special date ( Classico Barcelona vs Real Madrid ) she was wearing a hoody with a Barça cap he parked the car.. opened the door for her as she got in the car she saw the Barça shirt in the backseat he smiled and said...it's a small gift for you...she started clapping from excitement...he laughed then paused for a second...a different smile got on his face, seeing her baby side drove warmness into his heart.
In a small cafeteria they were watching with tea and pistachio and a lot of cheering while walid was already forming an even more bold idea inside his mind...
back to us in the cafeteria in lezzeno.
"She's the one"..he kept saying while looking into the lake holding his espresso..but asking the big question now is a risk he is not willing to take, " give it couple of dates at least " I said to him in that cafeteria.. little did I know he's about to do the craziest thing a romantic person has ever did.

parts.title: Walid's Wedding  ²
parts.content:
France riviera
In a heart stealing restaurant watching the waves as it hugs the shore in a beautiful dance.. writing secret poems on her note as she glances at me with her dark eyes every now and then, while I'm holding the pen thinking of a new plot of this story of life I'm creating.
Previously walid went back from lezzeno with a made up mind about Amina..
Oran 2034
" Hello Amina...I don't fake it...I don't lie.. I'm so attracted to you and I want you to be mine forever and ever...and I want to marry you..." Said walid looking into the mirror of the restaurant bathroom before he walks back to his table... seeing her fiery hair resting on her shoulders as she smiles in the most feminine way that melts any men down...made him swallow his words..silence was surrounding the table yet inside his head there was thousands of questions driving him crazy...she looked at his eyes before she asks...
" Are you okay walid ?"... suddenly everything stopped...just her tone and gentleness took over his mind...he replied " can we go somewhere later before I drive you home "..she nodded yes..
Fast forward..
" You did what ????? ".." it was an accident I swear to God "..wait we fast forward so much let's go back a little...
Walid drove to the nearest Flowers store to take a bouquet that he already pre-ordered, personalized in blue and red inspired from the Barcelona theme...he placed it secretly in the car trunk then drove again.
As he parked near her a sound of a bump was heard by both of them but no one cared as walid held Amina's hands and looked into her glistening eyes as he spoke " this might sound so crazy...but ever since I met you..I felt so drowned to you in a way I can't comprehend...and I don't want us to be just a couple I want more..." When he said that Amina's heart started beating while maintaining eye contact with her walid continued " I want you to be my wife not my girlfriend Amina "...she was so shocked her eyes were wide open..silence took over the place again but this time even their minds didn't escape it...as if the whole world stopped at that moment..she spoke with lower tone.." I have one condition "...he asked eagerly " what is it ?"
" Agree with me that Robert Lewandowski is getting slow and old "...her humor made walid reply in sarcastic tone laughing " anything you say babe "..they hugged before he asks her to stay in the car so he can open the trunk to bring her the flowers...
And then when he saw what caused that bump sound...it was a cat...he killed a cat without even noticing.. little did he know that it was Amina's cat...he took the flowers and went back to the car seat...when she saw them it made her eyes fill with joy her happiness always drove a smile into his face...those little claps and excitement is what made Amina so special and dear to him..
" I might have to tell you that we drove over a cat darling.. " she replied with sadness " oh noo is it alive can we help it..let me look "..." No Amina wait.."
and there goes the orchestra..
This incident made me choke from laughing it's so sad yet so messed up in a very ironic way yet the question lasts will she marry walid after this ?..there was no ring yet...just a promise and with a very good first impression of walid as a future husband..

content:
Lezzeno 2035 
The stars are reflecting their beauty on the lake creating a poetic view, while I'm talking to the new investor on the phone..she's drawing the village on a small board her eyes catch up with mine to take my opinion every now and then. 
A night walk back to the apartment she asked " did her really kill her cat ? " 

Oran - 2035 
Walid holding his phone looking at it for a quite a moment.." should I call her ?" He asks himself... Suddenly a text message appeared..it's Amina..

4am phone buzzing...
"Hey I'm coming to lezzeno  tomorrow I need to talk with you" I just replied " Okay " and went to sleep.


Lezzeno - 2035
I drove him from Milan's airport to our usual coffee table..
" Do you really love this girl ? " I asked handing him sugar for his espresso before he replies " do you remember that first time you met your wife..?" I replied " it can't be the same my story is a rollercoaster" he laughed " well it's the same here ".
The waiter came to serve us a fresh lemon cake.." she texted me yesterday and said she's having hard times to forget and that leo was 7years old she basically grow up taking care of him " I replied with a smile " I have an idea why don't you buy her a new cat "..I continued sarcastically " taking a cat from here to Oran is also an animal abuse so I do recommend you buy it from Oran" 
Walid's eyes got bright and he agreed with my idea. 

Oran -2035 
" Hey can you come down " Amina looked from the balcony and there was walid parking his car looking up to her...he waved and as he did her dad waved back at him from the street...

Walid face was just imaginable at that moment..." Hello uncle I'm here to deliver this to Amina's she ordered a cat from our agency of animal adoption center "...her dad replied in warm tone " that's so great..it wasn't so long a careless and inhumane son of a bitch  killed our beloved cat leo "..walid with shaking voice " ah that's so bad I'm really sorry " her dad shake his hand took the cat and walked home.. meanwhile walid drove from there not believing all this happened..

Phone buzzing again " are you out of your mind " said Amina's in angry voice...walid replied " I didn't know your dad could be home I wanted to surprise you..plus how are you babe I miss you  "..she's used to his craziness so she just accepted her faith...and replied " can we meet later we need to talk "...this sentence makes any person heart beat faster than ever since it's a door to all kind of bad scenarios.." we need to talk "..


Amina walked in the restaurant carrying her cherry red bag in an elegant way she sat in front of him, Oran pink sunset reflecting on her dark eyes as she looks at him with a smile that melts every part of his heart...the talk wasn't so bad after all... after discussing and agreeing and disagreeing on a lot of stuffs walid and amina finally decided to move forward towards engagement day.

Fast-forward : 
Lezzeno 2035
" Tesoro walid is calling you " said my wife as I'm walking out from the shower .. somehow he picks the best moments to call.." hey man...I'm going to Amina's house but there is an issue.." I asked " what is it this time ? " Walid replied while I'm wearing my suit " it's her dad....I met him when I wanted to suprise Amina's with a cat and I pretended to be a delivery guy...I don't know what to do man he will for sure recognize me ".

" It's easy man..pretend you own the adoption center" both walid and my wife said at the same time 
" are you out of your mind " ...I replied " look I know someone that does own an animal adoption center you can say you work with him "... luckily that plan worked yet her dad questions were so on point on how he knows Amina yet walid's answers were designed to make him the gentleman of the year...

- Oran 2035  the wedding day.
Driving to the la blanche villa..." What if I did kill your cat " 
I asked my wife sarcastically as she replies " I would've bought a gun "..that made me laugh as we parked right in front of the villa I saw Adem he stood there waiting for me..I left my wife talking to Sabrina as we were catching up we both saw Abdellah coming with a different"R" this time and we can't tell if this is the last one or there will be more of them until he finally settles for good..

The sunset was just cinematic inan astonishing way that made everyone feel the moment as if it's a cut from a romantic tale...I walked back to Abdellah and asked " did you doit ? " He started laughing and adem knew exactly what we did just by looking at us..
